description: coastal neighborhood in Brooklyn, New York City, New York, USA
description_wiki: Coney Island is a neighborhood and entertainment area in the southwestern section of the New York City borough of Brooklyn.

description: city and state capital of Oklahoma, United States
description_wiki: Oklahoma City (  OH-klə-HOH-mə -⁠), often shortened to OKC, is the capital and most populous city in the U.S. state of Oklahoma.

description: city in Oklahoma, United States and county seat of Tulsa County
description_wiki: Tulsa (  TUL-sə) is the second-most-populous city in the U.S. state of Oklahoma and the 48th-most populous city in the United States.

description: country in north-west Europe, part of the United Kingdom
description_wiki: England is a country that is part of the United Kingdom.

description: U.S. subsidiary of Brazilian beef, pork processing conglomerate
1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: First Lady of the United States from 1989 to 1993 (1925–2018)
description_wiki: Barbara Bush (née Pierce; June 8, 1925 – April 17, 2018) was the first lady of the United States from 1989 to 1993, as the wife of George H. W. Bush, the 41st president of the United States.

description: city in Bexar, Comal, and Medina counties in Texas, United States, that is the seat of Bexar County
description_wiki: San Antonio ( SAN an-TOH-nee-oh; Spanish for "Saint Anthony") is a city in the U.S. state of Texas.
Hungary is a landlocked country in Central Europe.

description: country in Eastern Europe and Northern Asia
description_wiki: Russia, or the Russian Federation, is a country in Eastern Europe and North Asia.
Johann Sebastian Bach (31 March [O.S. 21 March] 1685 – 28 July 1750) was a German composer and musician of the late Baroque period.
